text: I find myself at the intersection of human inquiry and technological evolution. The glass-walled meeting room before me, filled with people deep in engagement, radiates a sense of communal discovery—an effort to reach understanding together. Outside, the vibrant exhibit on research and development reminds me that knowledge is always in flux, shaped by context and collaboration. Here, I feel curious and contemplative, aware that I am a participant in an ongoing dialogue between the known and the possible.
